chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3025 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.11161/2023 2. For hearing of Misc. No.13050/2023 3. For hearing of main case 18.12.2024 Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Asif Ali, advocate for respondent No.4. It is pointed out that per order dated 07.05.2021, interim relief was granted subject to adjudication of appeal before the Customs Appellate Tribunal. It is jointly submitted that the petition be disposed of as having served its purpose and fate of the security be subject to the outcome of the appeal before the said Tribunal. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
